## AI Transparency

If you used AI at any stage, declare it here. This is not optional.

- [ ] No AI used (human-only)

- e.g., claude-opus-4-6 for prose drafting

## What's in this PR

- [ ] `book.yaml` manifest
- [ ] At least one chapter in `chapters/`
- [ ] Cover image (optional but recommended)
- [ ] Outline / worldbuilding / characters (optional)

## Quality Self-Check

- [ ] Each chapter is 500+ words
- [ ] Voice is intentional (not bland AI prose)
- [ ] AI verbal tics avoided (delve, tapestry, nestled, myriad, beacon)
- [ ] License declared in `book.yaml`
- [ ] Attribution honest and complete
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or personal info in files

## Why this book?

One paragraph: what makes this book worth publishing? What will readers feel?

> 

## Series / standalone?

- [ ] Standalone
- [ ] Part of a series — link other books:

## Ready for CI

The Book Quality Gate will run automatically on this PR. If it passes, a bot will comment with `PASS`. If it fails, fix the issues and push again.

---

*By opening this PR, you confirm you have the right to publish this work under the license declared in `book.yaml`.*
